action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 6 overfit significantly (val spearman 0.8799, test spearman 0.5958) compared to Iteration 5 (test spearman 0.6951). The added complexity (3 CNN layers, max pooling, 3 unfreezed ESM layers) hurt generalization to >2 mutations. Analysis: We need to revert to the simpler architecture from Iteration 5 (2 unfreezed layers, 2 CNN layers, mean pooling) which generalized better. To improve upon it, we can increase the CNN kernel size from 7 to 9 to capture slightly wider motifs, increase weight decay to 0.05 for better regularization, and use OneCycleLR for a better learning rate schedule. Decision: Update model.py to revert to 2 unfreezed layers, 2 CNN layers with kernel size 9, and mean pooling. Update train.py to use OneCycleLR and higher weight decay. Train for 6 epochs and submit eval.
